case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. PHOEBE YUE

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT YUE, PHOEBE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-20-2010
DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: 1. INTEREST 2. COST 3. ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUE, PHOEBE $20,960.62 PRINCIPAL, $3,214.40 INTEREST, $389.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,564.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
